title: SACRAMENTO
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem
raw_preview:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 2664 provides $22 million to the University of California system to help convert research and science into products that benefit society.",
    "The UC system is the world’s academic leader in the number of research inventions, with 1,700 reported in 2014."
raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 2664 provides $22 million to the University of California system to help convert research and science into products that benefit society.",
    "The UC system is the world’s academic leader in the number of research inventions, with 1,700 reported in 2014.",
    "The number of new entrepreneurs in California has dropped by about 10 percent since 2012.",
    "The funds provided by Assembly Bill 2664 will be used to transition innovations into start-ups in the private sector.",
    "Each of the ten UC campuses will receive $2.2 million annually to create business incubators.",
    "Investments in business incubators leverage UC research to turn ideas into job-providing companies.",
    "Existing business incubators within the UC system have already facilitated the development of an artificial human kidney.",
    "The commercial production of a spider silk, which is as strong as kevlar, has been aided by existing business incubators within the UC system."
  ]
}
```
